query:
UPDATE user_onboarding 
SET currentStep = 1, 
    completed = 0, 
    completedAt = NULL, 
    skipped = 0, 
    serviceId = NULL, 
    icpId = NULL, 
    headlineSetId = NULL, 
    campaignId = NULL,
    updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE userId = (SELECT id FROM users WHERE openId = 'arfeen-khan-open-id' LIMIT 1);
